heading: Omitted
label: 90 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which required authorization of Commissioner of the General Land Office for expenses chargeable to the Government incurred by registers, was omitted pursuant to Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1946, § 403, eff. , 11 F.R. 7876, , set out as a note under , which abolished the offices of registers and Commissioner of the General Land Office. Section was not repeated in the Interior Department Appropriation Act, 1948, , .
